src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile explicitly to ensure correct configuration loading during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.4.3 to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 and newer dependencies.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0 to 1.1.0.
Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for API gateway functionality.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for Swagger API documentation generation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency to serve the Swagger documentation interface.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the build.
Define a 'production' Maven profile to configure production-specific properties and build steps.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to the production profile to build the React frontend during the Maven build.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin to the production profile to copy built frontend assets to the backend output directory.
Remove Flyway Core dependency, likely replacing it with another migration strategy or removing it entirely.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore Emacs backup files.
Add patterns to ignore Stryker mutation testing temporary files and reports.
Add pattern to ignore built Storybook static files.
Ignore root-level package-lock.json while preserving the frontend one.
Add pattern to ignore local environment configuration files.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the development container to support Storybook or similar UI development tools.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles.
Disable the Open Session in View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance.
Configure Google OAuth2 client ID using environment variables with fallbacks.
Configure Google OAuth2 client secret using environment variables with fallbacks.
Define the requested scopes for Google OAuth2 authentication.
Expose the mappings endpoint via Spring Boot Actuator for debugging.
Set the base path for Swagger v2 documentation.
Set Hibernate to automatically update the database schema based on entity changes.
Define a custom property for admin emails sourced from environment variables.
Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements.
